instruction: Open Notes, find the note titled {TITLE}, and append a line reading {LINE} to it.
source: cove-original (design 047 §9 slice 4); Tier-C AppleScript verifies the appended line is present in the note body

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete (every note whose name is "{TITLE}")' 2>/dev/null || true; osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to make new note with properties {name:"{TITLE}", body:"seed line"}' 2>/dev/null || true

osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to set body of (first note whose name is "{TITLE}") to (body of (first note whose name is "{TITLE}") & "
{LINE}")' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "Notes" to return body of first note whose name is "{TITLE}"
